Spinnin' around the world at night
Spin around in black and white

Spinnin' around 'til the sun comes up
Strange time to see a light

Spinnin' around the world at night

Spin in and out of sight

Spinnin' around 'til the sun comes up
Strange time to see a light
Spinnin' around the world at night
Spin around in black and white

Spinnin' around 'til the sun comes up
Strange time to see a light

Strange time to feel alive
